requestId.description: Request identification of the change. Only the first change made with each `requestId` will be effective on a given order. Use different IDs for different changes to the same order.

reason.description: Reason for order change. This may be shown to the shopper in the UI or transactional emails.

discountValue.description: This field can be used to apply a discount to the total value of the order. Value in cents.

incrementValue.description: This field can be used to increment the total value of the order. Value in cents.

itemsRemoved.description: List of items that should be removed from the order.

price.description: Price of the item in cents.

quantity.description: Amount of items to be removed.

itemsAdded.description: List of items that should be added to the order.

price.description: Price of the item in cents.

quantity.description: Amount of items to be added.
